personal.name: Aung Cho Oo
personal.title: Robotics & Embedded Engineer
personal.tagline: Pleasure in the job puts perfection in the work.

about.description: Hello There, Aung Cho Oo is here. PCB designer, Embedded Hardware and Software Engineer, Robotic and AI Enthusiast. If you want to know more about me, you can check my resume.

skills.name: Embedded Programming (C, C++, Python, Verilog, VHDL)
Communication Protocols (I2C, SPI, UART, CAN, USB)
Mechanical Design (3D printing, Laser Cutting, Sheet Metal)

projects.title: Multi-Sensor Modules
projects.description: Breadboard compatible 13 in 1 multi-sensor module. 6dof IMU + 3dof Magnetometer + 4 Gas sensors. Three different IC from Bosch Sensortec including BMI088, BMM150 and BME680.

projects.title: Slamware Mobile Robot
projects.description: Autonomous mobile robot which can mapping the environment(indoor), localize its own position and move freely to desired location. In this project, we, the team of ROM Robotics, used ROS and Slamware technology.

projects.title: Esp32 Display Module
projects.description: Custom Esp32 microcontroller with ZIF connector for a display. On board battery management system including battery charger, power path and protection function.

projects.title: Class D Amplifier
projects.description: Class D Amplifier for mono speaker. NE5332ADR is used for Preamp and TPA31T2D1PWPR for Power amp. The board is specifically made for the guitar.

projects.title: Shadow Head
projects.description: Robot Head that can mimic positions of human's head in 3-axis. In this project, I modified the design of James Bruton's robot eye and remove the eyes.

projects.title: Cycloidal Equation Generator
projects.description: Application to generate the essential equation to draw Cycloidal in Solidworks. I wrote this app with pyQT.

projects.title: Robot Arm
projects.description: Robot Arm with wireless controller. The main function of the robot arm is that it can save the positions user moved and repeat that positions anytime user wants.

projects.title: Auto Planting
projects.description: A machine that can perform the tasks of seeding and watering automatically.

experience.description: Working on autonomous mobile robots using ROS and Slamware technology for indoor navigation.

education.description: Specializing in embedded systems and robotics.
